title: Dawn of Time: Beyond Vanilla
description: Adds a wide variety of variations for vanilla buildings blocks
body: # 🧱 Dawn Of Time: Beyond Vanilla **Dawn Of Time: Beyond Vanilla** is a Minecraft mod that expands the vanilla building palette with hundreds of new block variants using the [Dawn of Time](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dawn-of-time) block templates. Every block uses an existing vanilla material, giving builders far more freedom to detail and decorate their constructions without leaving the vanilla aesthetic. *** ## What this mod adds For a large selection of vanilla materials, this mod introduces new block shapes that do not exist in the base game: | Block type |Description | | ---------------------- |---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Plate |Half vertical blocks. Supports inner and outer corners. | | Edge |Half slab, similar to a plate but placed on the lower half of a face. Also supports corners. | | Support Slab |A slab with a structural cutout, useful for framing and detailing the ceiling. | | Support Beam |A beam is added below the support slab. | | Beam |A connected pillar with a wooden beam and a thicker base. | | Pergola |Thinner beam, useful for gardens and covered walkways. | | Lattice |A decorative cross grid panel, good for outdoor decoration. | | Stairs / Slabs / Walls |Filling in the gaps: vanilla materials that were missing one of these standard shapes now have them. | ### Materials covered The mod covers virtually every major vanilla material group: * All wood types (Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Cherry, Mangrove, Bamboo, Crimson, Warped), including leaf variants for Plates and Edges * Stone, Cobblestone, Stone Bricks and their cracked and mossy variants * Deepslate and all its variants (Cobbled, Polished, Bricks, Tiles, Cracked) * Sandstone, Red Sandstone, Cut and Smooth variants * Bricks, Mud Bricks, Packed Mud * All 16 colors of Concrete and Terracotta * Nether materials (Netherrack, Nether Bricks, Cracked Nether Bricks, Red Nether Bricks, Nylium, Soul Sand, Soul Soil) * Minerals (Coal, Iron, Gold, Lapis, Diamond, Netherite) * Copper (all waxed oxidation stages) * Amethyst, Quartz, Prismarine, Calcite, Tuff, Dripstone, Blue Ice * Natural blocks (Dirt, Sand, Gravel, Grass, Podzol, Clay, Moss and more) ### Unique block sorting system This mod is sharing the same Dawn of Time inventory system, allowing custom tabs and subtabs. All the blocks are sorted in 4 categories: * Building * Naturals * Colored * Dimensions This tab sorting architecture helps to memorize the blocks emplacements and make the process of finding between all the blocks way easier and smoother. *** ## Credits * **TheGoldenWorld**: mod development * **Poulpinou**: Dawn Of Time block templates that made this mod possible *** ## Support the Mod If you enjoy this mod and want to help us keep moving forward, consider supporting us on Patreon:
